tasks.subject: Task 1: Add lastSelectedItemByRepo tracking to store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Track the most recently selected task per repo so repo jumps can restore it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts:82-83` (add ref)
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts:169-174` (update selectItem)
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts:1480-1500` (expose in return)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `lastSelectedItemByRepo` is a reactive `Record<string, string>` in the store
- [ ] Every `selectItem()` call updates the map
- [ ] Exported from the store

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit` → no type errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lastSelectedItemByRepo ref exists", "selectItem updates the map", "exported from store"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Register shortcuts and wire navigation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ⇧⌘↑/⇧⌘↓ shortcut definitions and navigateRepos() function.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/composables/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts` (ActionName type + shortcut defs)
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/App.vue` (navigateRepos function + keyboardActions wiring)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ⇧⌘↑ jumps to previous repo, ⇧⌘↓ to next
- [ ] Restores last-selected task or falls back to first task
- [ ] Boundary clamping (no-op at edges)
- [ ] Navigation history records the jump
- [ ] Shortcuts visible in shortcuts modal

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit` → no type errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/composables/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts", "apps/desktop/src/App.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shortcuts registered", "navigateRepos function works", "boundary clamping", "history recorded", "modal shows shortcuts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add i18n labels
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add translated labels for the new shortcuts in all locale files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `shortcuts.previousRepo` and `shortcuts.nextRepo` in all 3 locales
- [ ] Shortcuts modal shows labels under Navigation group

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit` → no type errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["en labels exist", "ja labels exist", "ko labels exist"]}
```
